descriptionEn:
VALTOS Beach Bar is a welcoming and modern beachfront destination located on Potamos Beach in Epanomi, offering the perfect blend of relaxation, comfort, and authentic Greek seaside charm. With sunbeds set directly by the sea, friendly service, and a wide selection of drinks and snacks, VALTOS is an excellent place to spend an entire day on the beach. The crystal-clear, shallow waters of the Thermaic Gulf are ideal for swimming and family-friendly activities, while relaxing music creates the perfect holiday atmosphere. In the evening, guests can enjoy breathtaking sunsets and the peaceful coastal ambiance that makes Potamos Beach so special.

вҳҖпёҸ Complimentary sunbeds with minimum consumption.

Facilities:

рҹҸ–пёҸ Organized Beach
вҳ• Coffee & Refreshments
рҹҚ№ Cocktails & Drinks
рҹҚ” Snacks & Light Meals
рҹҡҝ Showers Available
рҹҡ— Nearby Parking
рҹҢ… Beautiful Sunset Views

descriptionRo:
VALTOS Beach Bar este o destinaИӣie modernДғ Иҷi primitoare situatДғ pe frumoasa plajДғ Potamos din Epanomi, oferind combinaИӣia idealДғ dintre relaxare, confort Иҷi atmosfera autenticДғ a litoralului grecesc. Cu Иҷezlonguri amplasate chiar lГўngДғ mare, servicii prietenoase Иҷi o selecИӣie variatДғ de bДғuturi Иҷi gustДғri, VALTOS este locul perfect pentru a petrece o zi Г®ntreagДғ la plajДғ. Apele limpezi Иҷi puИӣin adГўnci ale Golfului Thermaic sunt ideale pentru Г®not Иҷi activitДғИӣi de familie, iar muzica relaxantДғ completeazДғ experienИӣa de vacanИӣДғ. Spre searДғ, vizitatorii se pot bucura de apusuri spectaculoase Иҷi de atmosfera liniИҷtitДғ specificДғ zonei Potamos.

вҳҖпёҸ Иҳezlonguri gratuite cu consumaИӣie minimДғ.
